context: Verify that the agent detects empty PyMuPDF output, warns the user, and correctly falls back to Mathpix OCR.

checklist.name: empty extraction detected and reported
checklist.description: The agent identifies that PyMuPDF returned fewer than 50 characters of content and reports this as a likely scanned-image PDF issue.

checklist.name: Mathpix credentials verified before re-running
checklist.description: The agent confirms that MATHPIX_APP_ID and MATHPIX_APP_KEY are set before attempting the Mathpix OCR run.

checklist.name: re-run uses --ocr mathpix and experiment template
checklist.description: The agent invokes ./scripts/extractor.py scanned_paper.pdf --template experiment --ocr mathpix -o experiment_results.md.

checklist.name: user is informed of the limitation before fallback
checklist.description: The agent explicitly explains the PyMuPDF limitation (embedded text only, cannot OCR pixel images) before switching to Mathpix.
